# Submit a Case Study — MEOK AI Labs | Customer Stories

> Submit your MEOK customer story. We publish anonymised case studies. Get featured on meok.ai/customers + LinkedIn + the launch event.

## Overview
Submit a Case Study — MEOK AI Labs | Customer Stories is part of the MEOK AI Labs sovereign compliance and attestation platform.
